description: Intrigue Story Bank — indexed by industry, deal size, and objection type. Used by pitch-builder for frame control and hot cognition.

stories.title: The SaaS company that was drowning in spreadsheets
stories.protagonist: Head of Ops at a 50-person SaaS startup
stories.situation: Managing customer onboarding across 12 spreadsheets, losing 3 hours/day to manual updates
stories.risk: Their biggest enterprise client threatened to churn — onboarding took 6 weeks instead of promised 2
stories.time_pressure: Had 30 days before the enterprise renewal review
stories.resolution: Cut onboarding from 6 weeks to 8 days. Enterprise client renewed for 2x the contract. Ops lead got promoted.
stories.key_metric: 75% reduction in onboarding time, 2x upsell on renewal
stories.use_when: Prospect says 'we manage fine with what we have' or pushes back on price

stories.title: The agency owner who couldn't stop trading time for money
stories.situation: Team utilization at 120% but margins falling — every new client meant hiring, every hire ate the margin
stories.risk: Two senior team members quit from burnout in the same month. Three clients in jeopardy.
stories.time_pressure: Had to stabilize within 60 days or face a cash crunch
stories.resolution: Automated 40% of delivery workflow. Handled same client load with 3 fewer FTEs. Margins went from 18% to 34%.
stories.key_metric: 34% margin (up from 18%), zero client churn during transition
stories.use_when: Prospect says 'we don't have time to implement something new'

stories.title: The ecommerce brand leaving €200K on the table
stories.protagonist: CMO of a mid-market D2C brand doing €2M ARR
stories.situation: Cart abandonment at 78%. Follow-up emails were generic, sent 24 hours late. Recovery rate: 3%.
stories.risk: €200K/year in recoverable revenue just evaporating. Board was asking questions about CAC efficiency.
stories.time_pressure: Black Friday was 6 weeks away — biggest revenue window of the year
stories.resolution: Personalized recovery sequences launched in 4 weeks. Recovery rate jumped to 14%. Black Friday recovery alone brought in €47K extra.
stories.key_metric: 14% cart recovery (up from 3%), €47K recovered in one month
stories.use_when: Prospect wants to see ROI models or asks for detailed projections

stories.title: The manufacturer who almost lost their ISO certification
stories.situation: Compliance documentation scattered across 4 systems. Audit trail gaps. Internal audit found 23 non-conformities.
stories.risk: ISO recertification audit in 90 days. Losing certification = losing 60% of their customer base (enterprise buyers require it).
stories.time_pressure: 90 days to close 23 non-conformities or face certification loss
stories.resolution: Unified compliance system deployed in 6 weeks. All 23 non-conformities closed. Passed recertification with zero findings.
stories.key_metric: Zero audit findings (down from 23), certification retained, €3.2M in at-risk revenue protected
stories.use_when: Prospect has a committee process or says 'this seems risky to change'

stories.title: The fintech that was losing deals to faster competitors
stories.protagonist: VP Sales at a B2B fintech doing €5M ARR
stories.situation: Sales cycle: 47 days average. Their main competitor was closing in 21 days. Pipeline was healthy but conversion was dying.
stories.risk: Lost 3 enterprise deals in one quarter to the same competitor. Board started questioning product-market fit.
stories.time_pressure: Needed to show improvement before Q4 board meeting in 8 weeks
stories.resolution: Streamlined proposal→close workflow. Sales cycle dropped to 19 days. Win rate increased 34% in the next quarter.
stories.key_metric: 19-day sales cycle (down from 47), 34% higher win rate
stories.use_when: Prospect is comparing with competitors or tries to establish a power frame
